semantic.role: Schema for the ArchSpine SpineManifest configuration file, which records synchronization state and file-level indexing metadata for the mirror system.
responsibilities: Tracking synchronization events (last sync timestamp, mode, reverse index completeness, indexed unit count)
Storing per-file metadata including content hash, file kind, indexing timestamp, associated documentation files (by locale), and source existence flag
invariants: schemaVersion and generatorVersion must be non-empty strings
createdAt and updatedAt must be ISO 8601 timestamps
sync.lastSyncMode must be one of 'full', 'incremental', or 'unknown'
Each file entry must include contentHash, fileKind, lastIndexedAt, docs (array), and sourceExists
File paths (keys and doc paths) must match repoRelativePath pattern (external reference)
contentHash must match contentHash pattern (external reference)
fileKind must be a valid file kind (external reference)
docs array items must have locale (valid locale) and path (repoRelativePath)
No additional properties allowed at manifest root, sync object, or file entry level

English.role: Schema for the ArchSpine SpineManifest configuration file, which records synchronization state and file-level indexing metadata for the mirror system.

parameter_definitions.schemaVersion: Declares the version of the manifest schema; enforces compatibility with the system.
parameter_definitions.generatorVersion: Identifies the version of the tool that generated this manifest; helps track provenance.
parameter_definitions.createdAt: ISO timestamp of when this manifest was first created.
parameter_definitions.updatedAt: ISO timestamp of the last modification to this manifest.
parameter_definitions.sync.lastSyncAt: The most recent synchronization timestamp; can be null if never synced.
parameter_definitions.sync.lastSyncMode: Indicates whether the last sync was full, incremental, or unknown; affects delta decisions.
parameter_definitions.sync.reverseIndexComplete: Boolean flag indicating if the reverse index (mapping docs to files) is fully built; false implies incomplete.
parameter_definitions.sync.indexedUnitCount: Total number of indexing units (e.g., files or chunks) processed; must be non-negative.
parameter_definitions.files: Map of file paths (relative to repo root) to their metadata objects.
parameter_definitions.files.*.contentHash: Cryptographic hash of the file content; used for integrity and change detection.
parameter_definitions.files.*.fileKind: The type or category of the file (e.g., 'source', 'doc', 'config'); controls how the file is processed.
parameter_definitions.files.*.lastIndexedAt: ISO timestamp of when this file was last indexed.
parameter_definitions.files.*.docs: Array of associated documentation file references, each with a locale and path.
parameter_definitions.files.*.sourceExists: Boolean indicating whether the original source file still exists on disk; used for cleanup detection.

English.stability_and_risks: This schema defines the structure of the SpineManifest, a critical state file for the ArchSpine mirror system. Correctness and completeness of sync metadata directly impact the system's ability to perform incremental updates, detect stale indexes, and maintain consistency between mirrored files and their documentation. The enforced invariants (e.g., required fields, type constraints, no additional properties) help prevent data corruption and misconfiguration. Key risks include: (1) an incorrect lastSyncMode could cause the system to skip necessary full resyncs, leading to missing data; (2) a false reverseIndexComplete might prevent documentation from being linked properly; (3) missing or inconsistent contentHash values could cause undetected file changes; (4) setting sourceExists incorrectly may lead to orphaned index entries or missed file deletions. Regular validation against this schema is recommended to maintain operational stability.
